description: Enhance your product promotion campaigns this spring with our vibrant email design, bursting with fresh, green hues and delicate pink tones, perfect for fashion-focused businesses. The template embodies the essence of spring, adorned with beautiful flower motifs, adding a touch of nature to your sales pitch. It's designed to captivate your audience, highlighting your latest deals within a visually pleasing environment. The fusion of floral elements and sale indicators makes this design an excellent choice for businesses looking to promote their fresh deals, new collections, or seasonal offers. Grab this template and start blossoming your spring sales today!
short_description: Boost your spring product promotions with our vibrant email design. Adorned with fresh, green and pink hues, this template is perfect for fashion businesses. Highlight deals in a visually captivating, floral-themed environment. Ideal for promoting new collections or seasonal offers. Blossom your spring sales today!

designer.description:
I have gained experience and skills in communications and organization of the work while I was hired in E.Miroglio EAD. I’ve also got excellent French as I was living in France for a few years.

About an year ago, I’ve started designing interfaces and that’s definitely what I was looking for my whole life. I’m using Adobe Photoshop to design websites, emails and mobile apps. I also create prototypes in InVision to make the whole process from the start to the finish much easier.
